commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the Windows `config.openFile` command from `Start-Process -LiteralPath` to `Start-Process -FilePath` and updates the gateway command expectation.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests 0. Total 0 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source reproduction: current main routes Dashboard Open config through `config.openFile`, which emits the unsupported `Start-Process -LiteralPath` parameter on Windows. I did not run a live Windows click-through in this read-only review.

target.title: fix: use Start-Process FilePath on Windows
target.body:
## Summary
- switch dashboard config-opening on Windows from `Start-Process -LiteralPath` to the supported `-FilePath` parameter
- keep the existing single-quoted PowerShell escaping behavior
- update the config command test to assert the working PowerShell invocation

## Testing
- `npm test -- src/gateway/server-methods/config.test.ts`

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#90157
target.author: arkyu2077
